concerns.text: Data model defines 'checksum' field for KnotRecord entity, but contract schema knot-record.schema.yaml uses 'checksum_sha256'. This naming inconsistency between data-model.md and contracts/knot-record.schema.yaml will cause implementation confusion.

Deprecated file knot_record.schema.yaml exists alongside active knot-record.schema.yaml in contracts/ directory. While marked deprecated, its presence creates ambiguity about which schema is authoritative for contract tests.

Constitution Check table correctly covers all 7 principles (I-VII) with COMPLIANT status and implementation notes. However, Principle V (Versioning Discipline) references state file 'state/projects/PROJ-552-quantifying-the-complexity-of-knot-diagr.yaml' but the plan does not explicitly show how this file gets updated during execution - should document the update mechanism.
